name: claude-for-marketing
description: Agentic A-Z growth-marketing discovery & strategy engine. Takes a business from "we should do marketing" to a validated, data-grounded acquisition strategy with campaigns built and ready to run — for any vertical. Subject-agnostic: maps the inputs/connectors that actually exist (CRM/booking/transaction DB, analytics, ad platforms, search console, customer inbox, browser-only panels) via iterative AskUserQuestion, then maps jobs-to-be-done, ICP/demographics, competitors, channel economics, unit economics, capacity/timing, and the organic-vs-paid gap through a mix of asking the operator, pulling real data, and fanning out research agents. The engine is a decision loop: form a data-grounded assumption, let the operator challenge it from experience, adversarially verify BOTH against own-data or published research, correct openly (supersede, never delete), update the plan, repeat. Connects via own direct APIs (never blind-installs an MCP — scouts and verifies first). Maintains a clean knowledge base (canonical / reference / archive tiers, methodology doc, superseded log, changelog) and builds paused campaigns that never spend until the operator gives explicit go-ahead.
